title: Gift Card Options
description: What types of gift cards are available and how can they be purchased or managed?
narrative: The user is looking for information on different gift‑card products, especially multi‑brand or corporate vouchers, including how to obtain, order, track, and use them. Relevant content should describe the features of gift cards, purchasing channels (online, physical), redemption options across retailers, management tools for tracking orders, and any associated benefits or programs such as employee incentives.

title: Lamb Tagine Recipe
description: How can I prepare a traditional Moroccan lamb tagine?
narrative: The user is looking for a complete lamb tagine recipe, including a list of ingredients, step‑by‑step cooking instructions, cooking times, and any helpful tips or variations. Relevant documents are those that provide a full, authentic recipe with these details.

title: Lotus Car
description: What Lotus cars are available for sale and what are their specifications and buying information?
narrative: The user wants information about Lotus automobiles, especially used Lotus car listings, technical specifications, pricing, and purchasing advice. Relevant results should mention Lotus models, ads or inventory of Lotus cars, detailed spec sheets, and guidance on buying or selling a Lotus vehicle.

title: Veal Paupiette Recipe
description: What is a complete recipe for cooking veal paupiettes?
narrative: The user wants a detailed cooking guide for veal paupiettes, including a list of ingredients, step‑by‑step preparation and cooking instructions, cooking times, and any serving or variation tips. Relevant documents must provide a full, actionable recipe (or multiple variations) for veal paupiettes, preferably with photographs or additional cooking notes. Generic mentions of the dish without a complete recipe are not relevant.

title: Car Sun Protection
description: What methods, products, and practices can be used to protect a car’s exterior and interior from sun damage?
narrative: The user is seeking practical advice on shielding a vehicle from ultraviolet exposure, including recommendations for parking in shade, using windshield sun shades, window tinting, UV‑protective sprays, covers, and maintenance tips that prevent fading, cracking, and other sun‑related wear. Relevant documents should discuss these protective strategies and products.

title: Small Vessel
description: What are small vessels and what information exists about them?
narrative: The user seeks content describing small maritime vessels (e.g., boats, dinghies, small ships), including definitions, types, uses, specifications, and related activities. Relevant documents should focus on nautical small vessels; items that only mention “Small Boat” in unrelated contexts such as clothing collections are not relevant.

title: Passenger Car Sales
description: What are the recent sales figures, market trends, and manufacturer information for passenger cars?
narrative: Relevant documents should contain data or discussion about passenger cars, including sales numbers, market share, model line‑ups, or commercial announcements from automakers (e.g., Renault, Toyota, Volkswagen). Acceptable content includes reports, press releases, statistics, or analyses that focus on passenger vehicle performance or market activity. Documents that only mention unrelated topics such as personnel sales or non‑passenger vehicle information are not relevant.

title: War School
description: What is the School of War and what resources or programs does it provide?
narrative: The user is looking for a description of the entity called “School of War,” including its purpose, audience, and the kinds of materials it offers (e.g., publications, books, issues). Relevant results should explain that the School of War is a venue for study and reflection on military matters, outline its mission to generate intelligence and dialogue, identify the types of content available (such as titles, formats, pricing), and note how interested parties can obtain or engage with these resources.

title: Option Right
description: What is the ‘right of option’ offered by Pôle emploi and who can benefit from it?
narrative: The user wants a detailed explanation of the droit d’option (right of option) in the French unemployment system administered by Pôle emploi. Relevant information should cover eligibility criteria (e.g., minimum work periods, recent employment), how to exercise the option, its impact on benefit amounts and duration, procedural steps for applying, and any restrictions or consequences of choosing the option.

title: AXA Client Space
description: How do I access and use the AXA client/customer portal for insurance and banking services?
narrative: The user is seeking detailed information about AXA's online client area, including the correct login URL (e.g., https://client.axa.fr/), steps to authenticate, password‑recovery procedures, and the range of services available (insurance contracts, claim filing, banking accounts). Relevant documents should describe the AXA Customer Space, differentiate the insurance and banking portals, provide security tips (HTTPS, official domain), and explain how to retrieve a forgotten password or resolve login problems.

title: Top EVs
description: What are the best electric cars currently available, considering price, performance, range, and available purchase incentives?
narrative: The user is seeking a comparative overview of the most suitable electric vehicles on the market, prioritizing factors such as purchase cost, total cost of ownership after subsidies, driving range, charging time, battery lifespan, and overall performance. Relevant documents should describe specific EV models, pricing ranges, battery specifications, warranty information, and government or regional purchase aids that influence the overall value proposition of each vehicle.

title: Potato Late Blight
description: What are the symptoms, causes, and effective management practices for late blight disease in potatoes?
narrative: The user is seeking comprehensive information about late blight affecting potatoes, including how to recognize the disease (e.g., yellow then brown leaf spots, tuber rot), its fungal etiology, and practical control measures such as resistant varieties, cultural practices, and chemical or biological treatments. Relevant documents should directly address these aspects of late blight in potatoes.

title: Heaven to Earth
description: What spiritual or literary sources describe the descent from a heavenly (light) realm to a dim, earthly (dusky) world?
narrative: The user is looking for texts—such as poems, religious passages, or New‑Age/esoteric writings—that explicitly discuss a transition from heaven or a bright, celestial state to a darker, earthly existence. Relevant documents should mention both heaven and earth (or light and darkness), frame the shift as a journey or transformation, and convey symbolic or literal meaning of moving from a luminous realm to a “dusky” or material world.

title: Mad Space History
description: Where can I find information or a legitimate way to watch the film titled “La Folle History of Space” (The Mad History of Space)?
narrative: The user is looking for details about the movie known as “La Folle History of Space” (also referred to as The Mad History of Space), including where it can be streamed or downloaded legally, its synopsis, cast, and any official viewing platforms. Relevant documents are those that mention the film title, provide streaming links, download options, trailers, reviews, or official distribution information. Content unrelated to the film (e.g., privacy policies, unrelated technical data) is not relevant.

title: Office of Legends
description: What is the TV series “Office of Legends” and how can I access its episodes?
narrative: The user is seeking an overview of the French television series titled “Office of Legends,” including its premise, cast, season count, release dates, and where it can be streamed or purchased. Relevant documents should describe the series, provide trailers, list cast members, mention season releases, and indicate available distribution channels such as VOD, TV broadcast, Blu‑Ray or DVD.

title: Prevail Definition
description: What does the verb 'prevail' mean and how is it used in English?
narrative: The user wants a comprehensive explanation of the verb 'prevail', including its dictionary definition, synonyms, etymology, grammatical usage, and illustrative example sentences from literature or other sources. Relevant material should provide a clear definition, note historical origins, describe how the verb functions (transitive/intransitive, tenses), list related synonyms such as 'win', 'triumph', and supply contextual examples that demonstrate the word in use.

title: Uncharted Territory Show
description: What TV program or media content is associated with the phrase ‘go to uncharted territory’ and offers episodes about traveling to unknown places?
narrative: The user is seeking information about a television series (specifically the French program *Rendez‑vous en terre inconnu*) that frames its episodes as journeys into uncharted territories. Relevant results should describe the show’s concept, host (Frédéric Lopez), broadcast history (France 2, France 5, Club RTL), notable episodes and locations visited, and any related programming such as the follow‑up live show *Retour en terre inconnu*. Materials that merely mention the phrase without linking it to this series are not relevant.

title: Potato Prep for Diarrhea
description: How should potatoes be prepared and served for a diet suitable for someone experiencing diarrhea?
narrative: The user is looking for guidance on cooking potatoes in a way that is gentle on the digestive system during a bout of diarrhea. Relevant information includes recommended forms such as steamed or boiled potatoes, mashed or pureed without added fats or spices, and foods to avoid like fried, sautéed, or high‑fiber potato dishes. Relevant documents that discuss suitable starches, the avoidance of french fries, and the use of sweet potatoes as a starch are considered pertinent.

title: Event Space
description: Where can I find a rental space in Paris suitable for hosting events?
narrative: The user is looking for venues in Paris that can be rented for events. Relevant documents should describe event spaces, including location, size, capacity, available facilities, availability, and contact information for booking. Documents that only mention unrelated uses of the word "space" or do not provide rental or venue details are not relevant.

title: Energy Supplier Info
description: What are the features, pricing, and services offered by the E.Leclerc electricity supplier?
narrative: The user is looking for detailed information about E.Leclerc as an energy supplier, including how its electricity rates are calculated, any subscription or hidden fees, the availability of real‑time billing, mobile app functionalities, renewable‑energy options, and contract terms. Relevant documents should describe these aspects of E.Leclerc’s electricity supply service and explain how customers can manage consumption and costs.

title: Kia Car Information
description: What are the current Kia car models, their specifications, reviews, pricing, and recent news or recalls?
narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive overview of Kia automobiles, including the latest model lineup (e.g., Niro, EV6, Sorento, Sportage, Soul, etc.), technical specifications, performance test results, pricing information, and any recent news such as recalls, safety issues, or new feature announcements. Relevant documents must contain detailed model descriptions, test drives, specifications, pricing data, and coverage of recalls or other recent developments.

title: Gallic Overview
description: What were the Gallic peoples, their origins, and cultural characteristics?
narrative: The user wants a concise yet comprehensive summary of the Gallic (Gaulish) peoples, including their ethnic composition, geographic range, relationship to Celtic civilization, tribal organization, etymology of the name, and how they were transformed under Roman influence. Relevant documents should provide historical background, linguistic notes, and archaeological context about the Gauls as described in classical sources and modern scholarship.

title: Faro Car Rental
description: What are the available car rental options, rates, and pick‑up locations at Faro Airport in the Algarve?
narrative: The user is planning travel to the Algarve and wants detailed information on renting a car from Faro Airport, including a list of reputable providers, price comparisons, vehicle categories, reservation procedures, and any airport‑specific services or discounts. Relevant documents should mention Faro Airport, car hire companies operating in the Algarve, pricing or competitive rates, and pick‑up/drop‑off details.

title: Nantes Car Rental
description: What car‑rental options are available in Nantes, particularly at or near Nantes Atlantic Airport?
narrative: The user is looking for information on renting a vehicle in Nantes, France. Relevant results should describe car‑rental agencies operating in Nantes (especially at the Nantes Atlantic Airport), their locations, opening hours, booking procedures, vehicle types, rates, and any special services (e.g., 24‑hour pickup, return instructions, GPS or child‑seat options). Documents that only mention general tourism in Nantes without rental details, or rentals in other cities, are not relevant.

title: Potato Diseases
description: What diseases affect potatoes and how can they be identified and managed?
narrative: The user seeks comprehensive information on illnesses that impact Solanum tuberosum, including fungal, bacterial, viral, and pest‑related diseases. Relevant material should describe each disease (e.g., late blight, downy mildew, Colorado beetle damage), list typical symptoms, explain conditions that favor infection, and provide control or mitigation strategies such as crop rotation, resistant varieties, chemical or biological treatments. Documents that merely discuss general potato cultivation without disease specifics are not relevant.

title: Beaujolais Wine
description: What are the main appellations, grape varieties, and tasting characteristics of Beaujolais wines?
narrative: The user is seeking an overview of Beaujolais wine, including information about its official appellations, the Gamay grape, tasting tips, and related wine‑related events or workshops. Relevant documents should describe the twelve Beaujolais appellations, provide tasting guidance, and mention promotional or educational activities tied to the region.

title: Boat Shoes
description: What are boat shoes and where can I buy them?
narrative: The user wants information about shoes specifically designed for boating, including style, features, brand options, and retail sources. Relevant documents should describe boat shoes, list available models or brands, and provide purchasing details.

title: Renault Cargo Space
description: What is the cargo capacity of Renault vans and trucks?
narrative: The user is interested in the interior volume or payload space of Renault commercial vehicles (e.g., Renault Master, Renault Kangoo). Relevant information includes specifications such as cargo volume in cubic meters, load length, and dimensions that describe how much space is available for goods. Documents that list Renault models with details like "3500 20m3" or other volume figures are considered relevant.

title: Corfu Car Rental
description: What are the options, prices, and pickup locations for renting a car on the island of Corfu?
narrative: The user intends to travel to Corfu and needs to locate car‑rental services on the island, especially at Corfu International Airport or in major towns. Relevant information should include a list of rental agencies operating in Corfu, typical cost ranges, vehicle categories available, reservation requirements (driver’s license, age, credit card), pickup and drop‑off locations, and any special conditions (insurance, fuel policy, mileage limits). Documents that do not mention Corfu or car‑rental services there are not relevant.

title: Car Rental Meeting
description: Where can I find a car‑rental agency near the meeting venue or information about a meeting related to car rentals?
narrative: The user wants information that links a car‑rental service with a meeting location or event, such as an agency situated at or near a place called "The Meeting" or details about a scheduled meeting concerning car rentals. Relevant documents should mention both a car‑rental business (e.g., services, contact info, reservation options) and a meeting context (venue name, address, phone, or schedule) that ties the two together.

title: Lincoln Automobile
description: What Lincoln car models are currently listed for sale, and what are their specifications and prices?
narrative: The user is interested in information about the Lincoln brand, specifically the models that are available for purchase, their key specifications (year, mileage, engine, body type) and pricing. Relevant documents should mention Lincoln by name and provide details such as model listings, price figures, or descriptive attributes that help the user evaluate Lincoln vehicles.

title: Car Accident Compensation
description: What compensation am I entitled to after a car accident and how is it calculated?
narrative: The user seeks comprehensive information about compensation for car‑accident victims, including the legal framework (e.g., Badinter law), the criteria used to assess damages (physical injury, moral suffering, aesthetic prejudice, sexual prejudice, loss of earnings, disability), the calculation scales, and illustrative examples of compensation amounts. Relevant documents should describe the compensation procedure, eligibility for different victim categories (driver, passenger, pedestrian, cyclist), factors influencing the award (age, permanent impairment, loss of professional prospects), and provide real‑world case studies.

title: Bordeaux Concerts
description: What concerts are scheduled to take place in Bordeaux in the near future?
narrative: The user wants current information about live music events in Bordeaux, including the performing artists, dates, venues (such as Arkéa Arena), and ticket or reservation details. Relevant documents should list upcoming concerts in the city, provide venue locations, and include scheduling or ticketing information.

title: Indre-et-Loire Archives
description: What information is available about the Departmental Archives of Indre-et-Loire (Indre and Loire)?
narrative: The user is looking for detailed information on the Indre-et-Loire (Indre and Loire) departmental archives, including its location, collections such as the Menie Grégoire fonds, recent events, digitization projects, public workshops, and ways to access or contribute to the archives. Relevant results should describe the archive’s holdings, services, opening hours, contact information, and any related cultural activities.

title: Energy Mediation
description: What is an energy mediator and how does the mediation process work for disputes between energy consumers and suppliers?
narrative: The user is seeking a clear explanation of the function, eligibility, and procedural steps of energy mediation services (e.g., the National Energy Ombudsman), including when to contact a mediator, what types of disputes are handled, and what outcomes can be expected. Relevant documents should describe the mediator’s role, the dispute‑resolution workflow, applicable parties, and any legal or procedural requirements.

title: Office Computing
description: What are the current trends, options, and purchasing advice for office computers and related equipment?
narrative: The user seeks information about computers and accessories suitable for office use, including product categories, buying guides, specifications, and price trends. Relevant documents describe office‑oriented computer hardware, accessories, and market trends, or provide comparative advice for selecting office equipment.

title: Silver Photographs
description: What are silver photographs and how are they produced?
narrative: The user seeks an overview of photographic processes that rely on silver compounds, including the chemistry (e.g., silver halides, silver gelatin), historical development, and major types of silver-based prints such as daguerreotypes, albumen prints, and modern silver gelatin prints. Relevant documents should describe the composition, preparation, exposure, and development steps of these silver photographic methods and provide historical context.

title: Leek Quiche Recipe
description: What is a complete recipe for preparing a leek quiche?
narrative: The user wants a detailed cooking recipe for leek quiche, including ingredient list, quantities, and step‑by‑step preparation and baking instructions. Relevant documents should contain a full recipe (or a close variant) that enables the user to make the dish at home.

title: Car Puzzle Games
description: What online games feature cars, especially puzzle‑style or vehicle‑themed games?
narrative: The user is looking for interactive games that involve cars, with a particular interest in puzzle or vehicle‑themed formats that can be played online (preferably for free). Relevant results should describe games whose core mechanics revolve around cars—such as car‑related jigsaw, logic, or strategy puzzles—or list platforms offering such car‑themed games. Content that merely mentions cars in unrelated contexts (e.g., as a puzzle image category) is not sufficient unless it clearly presents the car element as part of a playable game.

title: Job Travel Assistance
description: What mobility and accommodation services are available to help job seekers travel to interviews or work placements far from their home?
narrative: The user is looking for information on employment‑related mobility aid programs, such as travel vouchers, host‑family lodging, and other support services that enable candidates to attend recruitment interviews or start jobs in a different location. Relevant documents should describe the types of assistance offered, eligibility criteria, how to apply (e.g., via job centre advisors), any associated costs, and examples of existing schemes (e.g., France's SAM network or similar services). Non‑relevant material includes generic mobility aids for disabled persons that are unrelated to employment or travel assistance.

title: SFR Customer Space
description: How can I access and manage my account through SFR's online customer space?
narrative: The user wants instructions and details about SFR's customer portal (Espace SFR), including how to log in, reset a forgotten password, link an email address, and view or modify their mobile plan. Relevant information should describe the portal's purpose, available features (e.g., plan management, CO2‑neutral options), and step‑by‑step account‑recovery procedures.

title: Best Oil Lamp
description: What are the top‑rated oil lamps on the market and which factors (e.g., fuel type, light output, safety, price) should I consider when choosing one?
narrative: The user is seeking a buying guide for oil lamps, looking for a curated list of high‑quality models along with key selection criteria. Relevant documents should describe specific lamp models, their specifications (fuel compatibility, wick material, glass quality, illumination level), customer ratings, safety warnings, and price or value considerations. Answers that provide comparative rankings, feature summaries, and practical advice for selecting an oil lamp that fits the user’s needs (indoor/outdoor use, decorative vs. functional) are considered relevant.

title: Madeira Car Rental
description: What car‑rental options, providers, and prices are available for a trip to Madeira?
narrative: The user is planning a visit to Madeira and wants detailed information on how to rent a car there, including a list of rental companies, price comparisons, pick‑up locations, and any relevant booking details. Relevant documents should describe car‑rental services in Madeira, compare offers and prices, and explain how to arrange a reservation for specific dates and times.

title: New Potatoes
description: What are new potatoes and how can they be prepared or cooked?
narrative: The user wants information about the variety of potatoes known as “new potatoes,” including their definition, seasonal availability, selection tips, and culinary uses. Relevant material should explain what makes potatoes “new,” describe their texture and flavor, and provide preparation ideas such as recipes, cooking methods, seasoning suggestions, and serving recommendations.

title: Return to Work Bonus
description: What financial bonuses or assistance are available for people who resume work after receiving unemployment or RSA benefits?
narrative: The user is seeking detailed information on government‑provided return‑to‑work bonuses, such as the personalised back‑to‑work assistance (APRE) for RSA recipients, including eligibility criteria, application procedures, benefit limits, regional variations, and the types of costs that can be covered (e.g., transport, training, equipment, childcare). Relevant documents should describe these programmes, illustrate how to apply, and specify the amount or maximum assistance that can be received.
